phrases.en: Dan splashes warm water onto his face.
He squeezes a little shaving cream into his palm.
phrases.zh: 他往手心挤一点剃须膏。

phrases.en: He spreads the foam evenly over his cheeks, jaw, and chin.
phrases.zh: 他把泡沫均匀地涂在脸颊、下巴和下颌上。

phrases.en: He drags the razor slowly down his right cheek.
phrases.zh: 他用剃须刀沿着右脸颊慢慢往下刮。

phrases.en: Then he shaves his left cheek the same way.
phrases.zh: 然后他用同样的方法刮左脸颊。

phrases.en: He carefully shaves his chin and upper lip.
phrases.zh: 他小心地刮下巴和上唇。

phrases.en: He rinses the sharp blade under the running tap.
phrases.zh: 他在流动的水龙头下冲洗锋利的刀片。

phrases.en: He checks his smooth skin in the mirror.
phrases.zh: 他对着镜子检查光滑的皮肤。

phrases.en: He rinses the leftover cream off his face.
phrases.zh: 他把脸上残留的剃须膏冲洗干净。

phrases.en: He pats his face dry with a soft towel.
phrases.zh: 他用柔软的毛巾把脸轻轻拍干。

phrases.en: Finally, he splashes some aftershave on his cheeks.
phrases.zh: 最后，他往脸颊上拍一些须后水。
